--- 
title: |
  Extended Data Table 3
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---



```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| label: library_data_imports

library(tidyverse)
library(table1)
library(gtsummary)
library(yingtools2)
source("utility_funcs.R")
gu_cohort_data <- readRDS("../data/gu_survey_cohort.RDS")
mUCdataFiber=filter(gu_cohort_data,cancer_type!=4)

```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| include: true
#| echo: false
#| label: import_data_add_labels

tbl_summary(mUCdataFiber%>%select(age,sex.factor,race.factor,latinx.factor,
                                  bmi,ecog_kpsConverted,stage.simplified.factor,varhistoyn_uc,
                                  visceral_mets.factor,liver_mets.factor,
                                  Impact.TMB.Score,
                                  io_line)) %>% modify_caption("**Supplementary Table. Baseline characteristics of patients with UC**")
```
